placeholders.name: Aurora Stone & Tile
placeholders.priceNotes: e.g. valid until end of quarter, bulk-only pricing

hints.leadTimeDays: Typical days from order to delivery.
hints.preferred: Marks this supplier as your org-wide default. A per-material preference lives on each price.
hints.preferredMaterial: Flag this as your preferred supplier for this material specifically.

validation.nameMax: Name must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.websiteInvalid: Website must be an http(s) URL.
validation.leadTimeRange: Lead time must be a positive number of days.

delete.title: Delete this supplier?
delete.body: {{name}} will be removed from your directory. Active price links will be hidden but historical snapshots are preserved.
delete.priceTitle: Remove this supplier from this material?
delete.priceBody: {{supplier}}'s active price for {{material}} will be removed. Historical snapshots stay so the timeline keeps its memory.

empty.title: No suppliers yet
empty.description: Add your first supplier to start tracking real procurement prices and lead times.

procurement.title: Procurement intelligence
procurement.subtitle: Live supplier prices, savings opportunities and price history for this material.
procurement.emptyBody: No supplier prices yet. Add one to start comparing.

addPrice.title: Add supplier price
addPrice.subtitle: Add a price for {{name}}. Saving creates a snapshot — old prices are preserved in the timeline.
addPrice.noSuppliers: There are no suppliers to choose from. Add one in the Suppliers directory first.

timeline.title: Price history
timeline.subtitle: One line per supplier · last 6 months
